title: centaurea urvillei subsp. nimrodis
intro: Centaurea urvillei subsp. nimrodis, also known as Nimrod's knapweed, is a plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Centaurea urvillei subsp. nimrodis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
